scripts.prod:prepare: node scripts/withDatabaseUrl.mjs prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.db:push:test: NODE_ENV=test SERVER_ENV_FILE=.env.test node scripts/withDatabaseUrl.mjs prisma db push
scripts.db:seed:test: NODE_ENV=test SERVER_ENV_FILE=.env.test node scripts/withDatabaseUrl.mjs prisma db seed
scripts.db:clear:test: NODE_ENV=test SERVER_ENV_FILE=.env.test node scripts/withDatabaseUrl.mjs tsx scripts/clearDbExceptUsers.ts
scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test SERVER_ENV_FILE=.env.test node scripts/withDatabaseUrl.mjs vitest run
scripts.test:unit: NODE_ENV=test SERVER_ENV_FILE=.env.test node scripts/withDatabaseUrl.mjs vitest run ../tests/server/unit
scripts.test:integration: NODE_ENV=test SERVER_ENV_FILE=.env.test node scripts/withDatabaseUrl.mjs vitest run ../tests/server/integration --passWithNoTests
scripts.test:prepare: NODE_ENV=test SERVER_ENV_FILE=.env.test node scripts/withDatabaseUrl.mjs prisma db push
